arts.ttl: Tottenham are trying to revive their deal to sign Chelsea defender Axel Disasi - as north London side look to recruit a defender on deadline day
arts.sum: Tottenham are trying to revive their deal to sign Axel Disasi from Chelsea, Mail Sport understands.

arts.ttl: How much money Chelsea are now set to receive from AC Milan for Joao Felix loan, it's more than Renato Veiga deal - Fabrizio Romano
Chelsea transfer news: Saint-Etienne midfielder Mathis Amougou in line to join in £15m deal?
arts.sum: Chelsea are reportedly closing in on a €15m (£12.46m) deal for a Saint-Etienne midfielder ahead of the end of the winter transfer window.

arts.ttl: Chelsea agree fee to buy Sporting CP midfielder – Staying where he is until summer
arts.sum: Chelsea can be relied upon in recent years to keep things going at the end of the transfer window, and they’re not letting anyone down in this winter market. The Blues remain active on a number of fronts, with multiple incomings and outgoings possible before the end of play this evening. arts.ttl: Chelsea complete move for USA star as he makes swift deadline day exit
arts.sum: Caleb Wiley played just six times for Strasbourg - who are owned by Chelsea chief Todd Boehly - but was recalled by the club on deadline day and has now linked up with Watford for the rest of the season

arts.ttl: Chelsea enquire over Sporting Lisbon teenager Dario Essugo - as Blues look to bring in midfield reinforcements on deadline day
arts.sum: Essugo, 19, has spent the season on loan with Spanish outfit Las Palmas and has impressed with his displays in the heart of midfield throughout 2024-25.

arts.ttl: Danny Ings to Celtic transfer interest surges on deadline day as Rodgers 'eyes' mentality monster reunion
arts.sum: A striker is top of the shopping list at Celtic Park following the departure of Kyogo earlier this month

arts.ttl: Tottenham reignite loan move bid for Chelsea centre-back Axel Disasi
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur have reignited their efforts to sign Chelsea centre-back Axel Disasi (26) in a deadline day loan move bid, according to The Telegraph’s Matt Law. The France international initially…
